reviews.text: Do not use these guys. Never reply to emails, never answer the phone, took months to get back to us or reply. Would book an appointment then not show up. Repainted roof and Paint is stripping off our roof already - they obviously didn’t prime it properly. Did not fix leak they were supposed to. Caused damage to the gutters. The sheer stress they caused is mindblowing. How they have so many good reviews is beyond me. Horrendous.

After a recent hailstorm, I was unfortunately scammed into having my roof replaced, even though I wasn’t convinced the damage was severe. I reached out to multiple roofing companies for a second opinion, and Weatherproof Restoration was the only one that responded.

Their customer service was excellent and very quick to reply. The estimator, Paul, arrived on time, was polite, and took the time to clearly explain what to look out for in the future. Although he couldn’t find any issues with the roof, I really appreciated his honesty and professionalism. I wouldn’t hesitate to contact Weatherproof Restoration again if I need my roof inspected or repaired in the future.

As another roofing company who has observed their work, I can confidently say that this business prides themselves on their above and beyond workmanship and professionalism. They are honest and dedicated to their customers, I’m impressed by the outstanding result they deliver on every single job. Best in the industry 👏🏽👏🏽

Really happy with our roof restoration and paint. Fair price, and a quality job by Mat. Great response and quick resolution to a minor concern we raised - sign of a quality, trustworthy business in my book. Can't recommend them highly enough.

Fabulous communication and service from Weatherproof Restorations.
From my first contact with them to my last contact they were very friendly, kept up communication, arrived when they said they would and completed the job with real professionalism.
Highly recommend them.

Firstly, they arrived on time. Very professional and knowledgeable about the issues. Fixed a problem with a leaking roof that several others had failed to achieve. Cost was even better than hoped. Absolutely brilliant outfit. Strongest endorsement for their work.

Very happy with the work that was carried out by WeatherpRoof restoration team. From the quote to the end product. Absolutely amazed with the outcome! They were very easy to deal with and highly professional. Would highly recommend them for any future projects.

Both Teams of the two fellows, who worked on our roof restoration were excellent.  We appreciated their helpfulness, and professionalism,
over the 2 days they worked at our house

Big shoutout and thanks.

Our roof now looks amazing after this great job!

Nick and his crew repaired the very bad solar installation, then repointed, cleaned and painted our roof in 3 days.
His advice and knowledge of restoring rooves is clear to see....they did a fantastic job!
I would highly recommend using Weatherproof Restorations to anyone looking for a great job at a terrific price.

A very good job from start to finish.  Quiet and work carried out on time, and we were kept well informed.  Final result is certainly up to expectations.  Rowan and Elijah were the team who did the actual job, I would certainly recommend these guys.
Investigating a minor roof leak for us, Paul was on time, very polite and professional, and talked me through the causes and the fixes he did. Highly recommended, great service, thanks Paul.

Our roof tiles were quite problematic to say the least. WeatherpRoof Restorations and more specifically, Kurt, Kyle, Ben, Ronin and Debbie were very attentive of our needs and the urgency. We are very happy with their workmanship and service. We would highly recommend them.

I agree with all the other reviews about this company and its people. They are value for money, understanding, helpful, professional - the list goes on. I’ve dealt with them for a number of years and the service doesn’t alter. Good value.

Service was great all the way with a prompt inspection for the initial quote, then did a fantastic job to take off part of our roof and fix the leak issue that several plumbers had tried to fix. Definitely recommend to others.

I have had our roof painted over the last weekend . Superb quality and attention to detail. Matt who painted our roof is absolutely amazing. He is very professional and experienced. I can strongly recommend Matt. Thank you for amazing job. Patrick n Anna from Eatons Hill

We trust Nick to keep us informed if our roof is in top condition. We get him to check it every few years. He has changed the valleys for us and done some pointing and also explained what a terracotta tile roof needs - which is not much! Very reliable, honest and has a great team.
Weatherproof Restoration is professional, efficient and deliver outstanding results! It is such a nice experience to deal with weatherproof. Couldn’t be more happy with them. Job well done guys!!

Really very happy with my newly renovated tiled roof done by WeatherpRoof Restorations. Great company to deal with and did such a great job. Also great follow up service to make sure that you are happy with everything. Big thank you to the two men that worked hard on doing a great job on a very steep pitch roof. Can’t recommend highly enough!

Very good experience with WeatherpRoof. Came to the house and shared photos of the roof so we could see what needed fixing (other companies wanted to quote from Google images of the roof). Price was reasonable, and Rowan was easy to talk to during the process and after. Admin was efficient, with clear invoicing. Most importantly, the roof looks amazing!

We recently had the pleasure of having Kyle, Kurt and Ben at our home to fix a roof restoration.  Their wealth of knowledge about roofs is second to none. We are glad that we went with WeatherpRoof Restorations and would recommend them if you need assistance with your roof. Thanks Sal

Dan and Lachy did such a wonderful job restoring the roof on our house! It's a weird roof, half tile, half metal sheeting, and I had trouble finding any company that would do the job - everyone focussed on all tile or all metal. But WeatherpRoof had no worries quoting on the job at all, and did an amazing job. Dan was able to spot what caused the water damage inside the house (no weep holes on ponting), when a few other companies tasked with that job couldn't find a reason at all! We're very happy!

WeatherpRoof Restorations gave me a quote which I accepted.  So glad I went with them.  They were on time, on the day the said they would come, and the work on my roof was done professionally. They even sourced tiles which were about 50 years old to do the job.  If you require a professional job, just use WeatherpRoof the no hassle, great company 10/10 for them. Thank you.

After the March 25 cyclone, I discovered a small roof leak. My insurance confirmed the water had come in through the antenna cable sealant and required me to get a qualified professional to repair it. I contacted over 10 different companies—all of them were either too busy, said the job was too small, or simply didn’t want to take it on. Even antenna companies turned me away.

Thankfully, I reached out to Weatherproof Restoration, and I’m so glad I did. Nick responded incredibly quickly, came out in no time, and fixed the issue on the spot! His professionalism, efficiency, and willingness to help when others wouldn’t really stood out. I highly recommend Nick and the team at Weatherproof Restoration—they truly care and get the job done.
Absolutely amazing job! We are so happy with the work and the colour. Great company. Would recommend 10/10

WeatherpRoof did our concrete tile restoration recently and did a sound job. The look of the roof and paint looks fine, but there were some communication issues throughout the job. The tradesman arrived on the wrong day (3 days early) and we now have internal ceiling water damage marks throughout the house from the pressure washing. We were not warned this was likely based on our roof type and lack of insulation. When raising these concerns while the work was being conducted, I was told this was normal and the terms and conditions covered this. There is indeed a proviso for minor water ingress, but I do think communication on this issue was subpar and did not meet my expectations for the amount of money paid. Despite these concerns, I paid the full invoice and provided photos of the damage throughout the house but received no acknowledgement or response, hence my rating. Apart from these issues the work appears fine.

If you are looking for an honest and reliable Roofer. Then Nick and his team from WeatherpRoof Restorations is the roofer for you. We got Nick out to do a quote on our roof thinking that we had to do major work. With Nick's honesty he told us to just do the recapping and then sent us a very competitive quote. I know and now you know this is the roofer for you.

We are very happy with Roofworks done on 7-1-2025.
Weatherproof Restorations were very attentive and prompt in all our email queries. Ben came and did all the repairs on his own, he was very efficient and kind to us explaining the works done. I strongly recommend WeatherpRoof to anyone who are having roof leaking and repairs required.
Thank you Debra, Nick and Ben

This is the only company that our family and friends uses for roof repairs.
Nick and his team are trustworthy reliable and  Nick explained all work required and pricing is very fair and reasonable.
Well done Nick and team.

Great service. The mess made by washing the roof was cleaned and part of their service was cleaning up after the fact and that included the splatter to neighbours. Professional done!
Before and after photos attached

Hello Debbie

Just wanted to pass on my thanks to your team for work completed repairing our roof this week. Nick who came to do the initial quote was professional and super knowledgeable and took the time to fully explain the options to us. And then a big thanks to Kurt and Kyle who came out to do the measurements between Christmas and New Years and did a temporary fix which averted disaster for us with all the heavy rainstorms we experienced in January. We are grateful.

And finally, Kurt and Kyle came to do the proper repairs on Monday,  showed up at the schedule time and were professional, courteous and it was obvious they were experienced and knew what they were doing, had the work completed in no time.

Not that is fun to need to have our roof repaired but at least it was a good experience with your team. Even though you don’t call yourself an ‘emergency response’ business, your team were far more responsive than a couple of other roof repair services who (falsely) claim to be ‘same day - emergency repair’ services.

I would highly recommend your business to anyone needing roof repairs.

Thanks & kind regards

Doug Kuskopf-Dallas

We have recently had our roof cleaned and restored by WeatherpRoof Restorations. I would like to say how pleased I was with the service from the entire Weatherproof team.
Debbie dealing with bookings and administration, Rob with the quote and Kyle and Ronin with the hands on work.
They were at all times professional, respectful, prompt and efficient.
Most importantly friendly and happy to answer and explain all of my questions.  A job very well done at an affordable price.
I have no hesitation in recommending them.
Sandy

Recently had my roof restored by Rowan and Elijah, both worked efficiently, cleaned the colour bond roof, ensured all gutters were cleaned, all down pipes working, solar panels well covered, painting result was fantastic, cleaned up well after completion of their work.  Communicate well, professional with great result.

We got a full restoration on a roof a couple of weeks ago. Matt our tradesman was fantastic. On time, turned up when he said he would and kept in contact with us. It was raining that week and he was on the roof cleaning. The roof looks amazing going from horrible peach to monument a lovely dark grey. Thank you for your hard work. We totally recommend this company and especially Matt.
Andrew and Kerry caton.

Could not be more happier with the professionalism and responsiveness of Nick, Jodie and the team.  Nothing was too much trouble, communication was great and I really appreciated their honesty and openness.  The workmanship was 10/10 and photos before and after were provided during every step of the process.  Would highly recommend as Nicks experience was evident and his work ethic next level.

Thank you WeatherpRoof Restorations
Team was easy to work with, very responsive , turned up on the agreed time.
No issues from start to end.
Roof was neglected by previous house owners, by the time the team had completed the job it looked like a new roof. Even had a neighbour comment on the amazing difference. The boys onsite were polite and friendly. Family and friends have used this company too, all very happy with the services provided. Happy to recommend to anyone.

Very happy with the work done by WeatherpRoof Restorations. Every staff member I dealt with was friendly and helpful. Nick and Matthew were very experienced and professional. Matthew did a great job. He was always available to answer any questions. I am very happy with the outcome. Thanks guys..

Absolutely no hesitation in recommending WeatherpRoof Restorations for your roofing needs. Nick did an excellent job in inspecting and offering very honest advise on our roof, saving us from any unnecessary repairs. Such honesty and integrity speaks volumes about this company.
An Absolute pleasure to deal with. Very Professional from beginning to end. Would highly recommend Nick and the Team

Nick and his team have done a fair amount of work for my customers that I have recommended to him.
The feed back has always been amazing for the quality of work done and his company staff and material are of a high standard.

We are really happy with the repair to our 50 year old tiled roof. This company was recommended to us by our builder. The whole team were very professional and pleasant. Thank you Debbie in the office, and Nick for his expertise is explaining the repair required. Thank you also to Kurt the roofer, who was also very efficient and pleasant.

I am very grateful to Nick and David for the amazing work done on the roof. Excellent customer service and communication, all minor details explained before the job. David arrived on time, did the job fast and perfectly, the place was left nice and tidy. Honest, trustworthy, reliable, reasonable price. Happily will be using services again, highly recommend for everyone!

The team at Weatherproof were professional and wonderful to deal with. They were quick and efficient and helped me choose a fantastic colour of paint for our roof as well. We are really happy with thier work and we appreciated that they took many photos of the roof to evidence the work required and completed. All members of the team were polite, friendly, honest, knowledgeable and a pleasure to engage. Thanks !

Another fabulous experience with Nick and the Weatherproof team. Honest, reliable, a genuine nice guy. So glad to have found out about Nick  many years ago and have him take care of our roof. Not a single issue with anything during the February rain/flood and all the work he did in 2018 is still in great condition.
Will continue to recommend you to family and friend!

Recently had our tile roof restored by WeatherpRoof Restorations. Service was 5 stars with good communication during all phases of the work, from initial inspection to the work being completed. Matt was a pleasure having around our place. Cost was competitive (better than most other quotes we got) and standard of work looks amazing.

The team at Weatherproof Restorations are
honest, reliable, professional and knowledgeable.
They provide advice on preventative maintenance and what work is required in the short term.
Kurt and Ben did a great job on our
roof.
We appreciated the regular updates from Debbie in the office as we worked around the  rainy days.

Really a painless and a professional experience, dealing with Nick and his team.
quote was given on the spot, we made the decision and advised Nick.
Job got scheduled and completed on time.

The communication was great, every step of the way.

The result was amazing, and looks like a new roof.

Thank You.
Naleen

Nick and his team are fabulous. They are knowledgeable, friendly and will do their absolute best for you. From start to finish they communicate the whole way, work out the most suitable/cost effective option and do the job well.
Ronin did a fantastic job. He was prompt and efficient He went above and beyond and the 22 year old roof looks brand new. We would highly recommend him and this company.

Really good roof restoration work. From coordinator Debbie through to the team doing the roof work, they were excellent. Given there were tenants in the house and lots of intermittent wet weather, I always knew what was happening and when. Super professional people at WeatherpRoof.

Super happy with the work done by WeatherpRoof Restorations, from the initial inspection with Nick ,very professional and communication was great.
Huge shoutout to Matt, very impressed with the quality service, workmanship and always happy to answer questions . Would highly recommend to everyone !
Wish you guys all the best with your business 10/10
Regards
Nadine & Tony
Amazing service and great work. Nick was extremely helpful and was very transparent with us. I'd absolutely use Weatherproof Restorations again.

Very disappointed with the difficulty I've had getting a quote. Originally reached out around the 10/12/24. Multiple appointments booked and cancelled - some due to weather which is understandable. I continued to reach out due to their excellent ratings. Had another appt booked when no one showed up and I wasn't contacted. I called and was rebooked for the next week. Once again, no one showed up. When I contacted the office I was told it wouldn't have been booked for this day as they estimators were at a conference. I then rebooked again for a Monday and was contacted the Thurs prior as the estimator was in the area. I was at work but agreed he could have a look. That was about 1.5 weeks ago and I've heard nothing since. Very disappointing.
Ben Ronin and Sam did a great job , it was very windy but they still managed to get the job done , very satisfied would highly recommend

I don't have anything negative to say. From our initial contact through to site visit and answering follow up questions. Even when we had to reschedule due to illness the team at Weatherproof were great.
The work was completed well and to a very good standard. Even to the point that at the end of the day, just as the work was completed, a storm came through our suburb. Weatherproof returned to our house a week later and made good any work that had been damaged by the storm.
Can't recommend them highly enough.
A very prompt and reactive company with a great customer awareness, responsiveness and communications. A pleasure to work with.

Nick & his team do amazing work! The decades of experience show through on the finished product. They are friendly & professional. The 20yr warranty that comes with the paint is above and beyond what other companies offer. Highly highly recommend this company!

We just used WeatherpRoof Restorations to do a full roof restoration and repaint. The process from start to finish was really easy and we were happy with the level of communication leading up to the job. On the job, Dan & Lachy were really great! They were both polite, professional, respectful of our time and careful of surrounding areas when completing work.

Thankyou very much for the fantastic work completed by your company. We are very impressed with the quality service, workmanship and overall experience we had with weatherproof restorations. Our newly restored roof and guttering looks fantastic and was the exactly result we we're after. We would not hesitate to engage with weatherproof restorations services again in the future. Thankyou very much.

Called Nick and the team to do a full roof renovation and paint.  From day one Nick was friendly, trustworthy and a pleasure to deal with.

He explained everything in detail about what was going to be done and why it was going to be done.

Some companies didn't bother coming out to quote they just measured on Google maps then sent the quote out, however Nick and his team came out for any queries I had and were extremely competitive on price.

Upon seeing the finished works the quality is above and beyond what I expected.

Would happily recommend to friends and family as a first and only point of call.

I highly recommend WeatherpRoof Restorations! I had not found a reliable roofer until now!  They were responsive from start to finish.

Nick is very experienced and also took the time to explain what immediate issues needed to be addressed.

I also liked his honest approach of giving me a heads up of what I needed to budget for in the coming months for the non-urgent issues.

As a business owner myself I can also appreciate their investment into technologies and processes such as reminders, alerts and even before and after videos and photos emailed to me at completion.

I can't thank WeatherpRoof Restorations enough for their great service. We need more professional subbies like them!
Great experience with Weatherproof. No regrets and very professional.

Excellent clean and paint done on my roof by Nick and the team. Looks like brand new. Rowan and his co-worker did an excellent job, left everything clean and tidy, good communication throughout and were on time.

We have used WeatherpRoof twice now for repointing our tiled roof and most recently, leaf guard which works fantastically.
The crew arrived on time, were polite and respectful from beginning to end. We are getting them to come and do some more leaf guard on our sheds as it works so well. Thank you and your team.

Really considerate, upfront, honest and reliable business. Nick really to the time to work with mother and myself to reassure her understanding of what was required, being done and provided photo evidence of before during and after showing that extra professional effort and service along with his other staff who helped complete the job promptly and diligently.

Hi boys,  thanks for doing excellent job. If I would like to give your guys 6 stars if I can.
It’s a professional and organised company. The  great team work and good communication, not only between workers ( Ronin, Kirk and curly hair man) but also office Debbie and Nick.
The roof looks great. Thanks Kirk did the extra job for me, put the meshes around the solar panels.👍👍👍👍👍👍

We had our 20yr old colourbond roof cleaned, sealed and resprayed a new colour. Excellent communication every step of the way. Everyone showed up on time, from the initial quote to the painter on the day.  Mat, the painter kept us informed and did the work without any interruption to us. Would and have recommended to others.

I'm a very particular person and have high expectations. I'm ecstatic to leave this google review as this company ticked every box which doesn't happen very often these days. Excellent team. Excellent communication. Excellent result. Highly Recommend. Thank You Heaps. Dale
Weatherproof Roof Restorations repointed and re-sprayed our tile roof a couple of months ago.  They did an excellent job.  Highly recommended.

Weatherproof Restorations recently cleaned, repaired,
re-pointed and painted our roof. We are very happy with the results. Everyone was professional and friendly. Would happily recommend them.
The team at WeatherpRoof restoration deserve a special mention for doing quality work. Excellent team, professional approach to the task. Affordable price for quality workmanship and materials.

When contacted were timely in replying and taking action.
Work was carried out as agreed with enthusiasm and minimal disruption to us. What was agreed and expected cost was all done and adhered  to. Would recommend them for roof repairs cleaning and painting
Louwrens

I would like to thank Ryan who pressure cleaned  our roof.
Thank you to Lachlan for his return twice due to rain. Both of these  men were on time and very polite.
We are very happy with our colour and  finish.

Nick did an excellent job with our roof, for a great price. Communicated clearly what was to happen and completed the job efficiently. Also gave additional information for follow up,  appreciate everything.
Very happy, easy to deal with from quote to finished product. Friendly  and helpful staff. Matt was fantastic - very experienced and professional and he did a great job on the roof.
Nick and the team did an amazing job fixing the leaks on our tile roof. He sent a text and email to confirm bookings and turned up on time. 100% recommend
We get Nick and the team out every year to check our tile roof before storm season and boy am I glad we did this year! Terrific guys!

Nick is the real deal - an old school craftsman, super knowledgeable and a creative problem solver. We will be getting Nick back in a few years to re-point our terracotta tiled roof. Highly recommend!
My experience with Weatherproof Restorations couldn’t have been better. Matt who did the job was helpful and nothing was too much trouble. Thanks again for a professional experience.
Highly recommend Weatherproof Restorations. Chris did a fantastic job & the site was left absolutely clean. Price was  pretty good as well.

Full restoration done. From the initial quote arrived on time and very informative and reasonably priced with quality product. Carlos did a great job again on time each day extremely polite and a hard worker.  Thank you.

Roof looks a lot better since I had a full redo , However we had to clean up the water in my garage , bathrooms and ceiling after they washed my roof , Attached shad cloth they blew off and pick up solar lights they knocked down  and then had to get them twice  to fix parts of the roof they forgot to paint .
I just need heavy rain now to see if it leeks and see what there response will be .

Poor communication. They showed up unannounced to my tenanted property and started working away without ever organising a time or date that suited the tenants who are shift workers. Furthermore, one of the two issues that I wanted fixed on the roof was not fixed, and zero communication about why, despite the fact they would have known this to be an issue right from the beginning. Finally, it was very difficult to contact them during business hours.
Pressure wash and Mould treat 30 yr old dirty Metal roof ,,,,,Great end result ..Just little slow returning phone calls :)

What a great experience working with such professionals, from Debbie at reception lovely young man who did the quote to Matt, best tradesman ever  he let me know what was happening at all times. Highly recommend this team
Great professional team who you can trust. Great communications, turn up when they say and brilliant at what they do.
Lachy and co did a great job cleaning and repainting our tin roof, looks brand new!  Very easy to deal with and very professional.
I am very pleased with the job, it looks great. Matt was very easy to deal with and explained every thing he was doing. It should last another 30 years.
Nick repaired and painted our roof and carport. Top quality workmanship - totally professional. Fantastic result. Thanks Nick!
10/10! Turned up on time for both the quote & work schedule. Fantastic price & quality workmanship. I definitely recommend ☺️
Weatherproof Restorations were very helpful and pricing was great. Highly recommended!
Our roof is the envy of the neighbourhood! Mathew, our roofer, was friendly, hardworking, and did a fantastic job on our tired old roof. Now it looks a million times better! Thank you :)
The friendly team  (Dani, Locky and Casey) turned up on time, did an excellent job and cleaned up before they left. I can recommend this company.
Nick was awesome. Very honest and very reasonably priced and exception attention to detail. Don't get ripped off, get a honest opinion from an honest bloke.
Nick and the team are brilliant and extremely energetic.  Love their work.
Nick’s professionalism is absolutely fantastic. He’s a great bloke and provides exceptional service. Highly recommend.

Kurt was amazing, such a hard worker and did a fantastic job.
Thoroughly recommend
100% would recommend! Look no further for the most professional, friendly and honest roofers! Thank you team for being amazing.
Glad I had your business come out for my repair today. Would highly recommend you to anyone that needs roof repairs. Thanks again
We had a roof restoration done and Carlos was amazing at his job, the knowledge about the work and left the place really nice and tidy.
Had the clips replaced, repointing and some minor repairs.  Good job and clean up after.  Would recommend.
We would happily recommend WeatherpRoof Restorations as we were delighted with the result on our 25 year old roof.
Professional job from quote to completion. Would recommend for anyone needing roof work completed!
Thanks so much for my beautiful new roof. We are so happy it's looks amazing.
I would recommend this company to anyone who wants a roof restoration.  Chris was amazing.

The eam was easy to work with and attended on day and time advised.
All round a good experience.
Lead flashing work is thorough and superb
Efficient and did a good job.
Honest, Professional and punctual. I Highly recommend them for best quality and perfect performance.
Great service and excellent work. Highly recommended
Great service by the boys and quality job
Great on time service - quality and professional workmanship.
20 year warranty on products and a job well done
Great company to deal with, courteous and professional.
Highly recommend Weatherproof Restorations

10 months ago had section of gable end rebedded and repointed, plus cement fiber under board replaced. Did exactly what was requested. Turned up on time and job satisfactory after 10 months.
Would use this company again.
A great restoration of our roof. Weatherproof communicate well and have made our roof look brand new. We appreciate a 20 year warranty on the roof paint too. A very high quality finish
I have been waiting for an inspection for one month. I was reassured about how to proceed with the work according to my plan and then they simply disappeared. Phone calls and emails didn't help.

After having our roof cleaned, we realised that it was in need of some repair and paint as the previous colour had long since faded. We contacted WeatherpRoof for a quote. It was a very simple and straight-forward process. Debbie was lovely and was able to book us in for a quote over emails. Joel, the estimator, was fantastic. He was prompt to the appointment and provided a very thorough quote for the job. I would definitely recommend WeatherpRoof to friends and family.

Nick and the team at weatherproof restorations did an excellent job on re-screwing my 30 year old metal roof. They also replaced some metal roofing sheets as they found some rust holes that would have caused a big leak soon if not reported. Great attention to detail and a job well done. They got the job done in a reasonable amount of time considering the storm season this year. Highly recommend for a genuine company.
Paul came, inspected the leaking area,and fixed our metal roof!!
Happy with the work. After photos showed clean gutters free of leaves.

Weatherproof restorations did a beautiful job of cleaning out my gutters and made sure that they are clean and flowing freely. And they also installed Valley storm Seal. My roof looks very clean and ready to hand for the next lot of rain. Very Smooth operation from booking to completion. Photos Supplied after completion.

WeatherpRoof Restorations staff were professional, clear, upfront and fully communicative right through the process, from the quote through to works, then extensive photographic evidence of roof work (before and after). Very happy with their service.

The team at Weatherproof restorations did an awesome job on a tricky roof fix. The team are really responsive and went above and beyond. Would definitely recommend. Thanks to Nick, Kurt and the whole team at weatherproof restorations.

We had a fantastic experience with weatherproof restorations, totally professional , great workmanship and nice people … Matt our trady was awesome, as were Debbie and the team in the office also … thanks for a great job

I had the team from WeatherpRoof Restorations install some Solar Whirly Birds on my roof to replace our existing hair damaged whirly birds! I would 100% recommend their service to anyone looking for any roof restoration work!

My husband met up with Joel when he turned up as told he would and I could hear them laughing together.  Joel listened to all the problems and addressed them.  The quote came through within an hour as well as a choice of dates to get the job done once we accepted the quote.  Very good experience thank you.

Big thanks to the team at Weather Proof Restorations  , Our roof is  a tiled Roof , over 35 years and no maintenance and they repiared , replaced over 60 broken tiles, lead flasing and repointed. Extremely professional from theoffice to the quick pricing to the installers all take pride in their work and the end result a fantastic job- They came as recommended from my Neighbours as previous cousters ... Our roof and the house looks new. If you want the best, professional service---- I highly recommend Weather Proof Restorations big thanks Darrel & Lorella

analysis.summary: Customers overwhelmingly praise the business for its honesty, professionalism, and clear communication, particularly valuing transparent assessments that avoid unnecessary upsells. A single severe complaint regarding poor workmanship and communication exists, but it appears to be an outlier against a backdrop of consistent high satisfaction.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: Weatherproof Restoration was the only one that responded... I really appreciated his honesty and professionalism.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Joe
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Hero section proof of integrity and responsiveness

quotable_for_redesign.quote: Great response and quick resolution to a minor concern we raised - sign of a quality, trustworthy business.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Sam
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Trust section highlighting after-care and reliability

quotable_for_redesign.quote: From my first contact with them to my last contact they were very friendly, kept up communication.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Julian

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data. The absence of responses to the negative review is a potential risk, though the high volume of positive reviews currently masks this gap.
redesign_hooks: Feature Joe Lin's review prominently to counter 'scam' fears common in roofing by highlighting honest, no-upsell inspections.
Use Sam Pengelly's quote in a 'Why Choose Us' section to demonstrate proactive problem-solving and trustworthiness.
Highlight the peer endorsement from Elizabeth High to establish industry credibility and quality assurance.
